text:

author: devasabu
text: Fun fact...he started on his research because he was on a sea trip over the Mediterranean Sea and went "huh I wonder why the sea is blue"

author: krignition
text: No. Chandrasekhar is not a family name, but a given name. Many Tamil people stopped using family and use their father’s name as a “last name” instead.
